title: Action Mobs
description: A mod that adds pose-able mob statues to Minecraft.
body: # Actions Mobs A mod that adds pose-able mob statues to Minecraft. Sneak + right click to open Edit Screen. Right click with an item in your hand for the statue to equip it. Right click with an empty hand to retrieve an item equipped by the statue. [![Kinetic Hosting Affliate Link for Cyborg Pigeon](https://i.imgur.com/OVfuXg1.png)](https://billing.kinetichosting.net/aff.php?aff=587)
